# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL of the artifact to download')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_TYPE', defaultValue: 'jar', description: 'Type of artifact (jar, war, zip, etc)')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_SERVERS', defaultValue: 'prod1,prod2', description: 'Comma separated list of production servers')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_PATH', defaultValue: '/opt/app', description: 'Path to deploy artifacts on servers')
        string(name: 'CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: 'artifactory-credentials', description: 'Credentials ID for authentication')
    }
    environment {
        ARTIFACT_NAME = "${params.ARTIFACT_TYPE}"
    }
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL) {
                        error "ARTIFACT_URL parameter is required"
                    }
                    if (!params.DEPLOY_SERVERS) {
                        error "DEPLOY_SERVERS parameter is required"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactFile = "${params.ARTIFACT_TYPE}"
                    withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: params.CREDENTIALS_ID, 
                                                     usernameVariable: 'USERNAME', 
                                                     passwordVariable: 'PASSWORD')]) {
                        sh """
                            mkdir -p ./downloads
                            curl -L -u \$USERNAME:\$PASSWORD -o ./downloads/${artifactFile} ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}
                            if [ \$? -ne 0 ]; then
                                echo "Failed to download artifact from ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                                exit 1
                            fi
                            echo "Artifact downloaded successfully"
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',')
                    def artifactFile = "${params.ARTIFACT_TYPE}"
                    def deployPath = params.DEPLOY_PATH
                    
                    for (server in servers) {
                        server = server.trim()
                        if (server) {
                            withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(credentialsId: 'prod-server-credentials',
                                                              keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY',
                                                              usernameVariable: 'SSH_USER')]) {
                                sh """
                                    ssh -i \$SSH_KEY -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \$SSH_USER@${server} "
                                        mkdir -p ${deployPath}
                                        cp ./downloads/${artifactFile} ${deployPath}/
                                        echo 'Deployed to ${server}'
                                    "
                                """
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
        success {
            echo "Deployment completed successfully"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Deployment failed"
        }
    }
}
